The '''''Dominant''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
[[File:DominantBridge.png|thumb|left|The bridge of the ''Dominant''.]]
Built around [[6 BBY/Legends|6 BBY]], the ''Dominant'' shared a connection with the military career of [[Pter Thanas]]. Under Thanas's command, ''Dominant'' [[Battle of F'Dann IX|fought]] the [[Crimson Nova]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] at [[F'Dann IX]], and presumably served in a defensive capacity while Thanas was stationed at [[Alzoc III/Legends|Alzoc III]]. When Thanas was transferred to [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], ''Dominant'' became the system force flagship under the command of Captain [[Dren Jamer]], where its primary task consisted of a detailed mapping of the [[Bakura system/Legends|Bakura system]].

By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], ''Dominant'' was showing its age with a set of failing lateral thrusters. Despite its age, ''Dominant'' played a critical role in the [[Invasion of Bakura]] as the most powerful warship of the [[Bakura Truce|Imperial-Rebel alliance]] at Bakura. After successfully driving back the invasion force, ''Dominant'' turned its guns against the Alliance cruiser-carrier ''[[Flurry]]'', and on [[Wilek Nereus|Governor Nereus's]] orders, destroyed it.

In the subsequent [[Bakura Incident|Bakuran revolution]], Thanas surrendered ''Dominant'' to the Alliance and defected. As Captain Jamer departed with the remaining Imperial garrison forces, Thanas was placed in command of ''Dominant'' as flagship of the newly created Bakuran Alliance system defense force.
